_comment: Hard filter for meal-shaped foods used by recommend_v2 in food_recommender.py. The schema:

_schema.include_uncategorized: bool — include foods with food_category_id IS NULL (most USDA foods, including Apples, raw)
_schema.allowed_category_ids: list[int] — additional categories to allow; foods NOT in this set AND NOT uncategorized are excluded

_excluded_categories_rationale.2: Salt — pure salt entries (not a meal)
_excluded_categories_rationale.4: Oils — pure cooking oils (ingredients, not meals)
_excluded_categories_rationale.5: Nutrient breakdowns of other foods (sub-entries, e.g. 'Total Fat, Ground turkey...')
